# MGM Garage Supply

MGM Garage Supply is a warehouse-based business specializing in garage door hardware. The business operates as a supplier, likely serving contractors, installers, and possibly retail customers looking for garage door components and parts.

Source: https://example.com

What We Provide



## Industrial Hardware Supply,Built for the Trade


MGM Garage Supply operates from a fully stocked warehouse, delivering the garage door components contractors and installers depend on — with the depth of inventory and specialist knowledge to back every order.














### Garage Door Parts Inventory



A comprehensive warehouse inventory of garage door hardware — springs, cables, rollers, hinges, tracks, and panel components — available in quantity for immediate fulfilment. No waiting on back-orders when the job demands it.


- Torsion & extension springs

- Tracks, rollers & hinges

- Cables, drums & hardware kits













### Contractor-Ready Supply Support



Structured to serve professional installers and trade contractors with efficient order processing, bulk availability, and direct warehouse access. We understand job-site timelines and stock accordingly — so your crew stays moving.


- Bulk & trade order fulfilment

- Direct warehouse access

- Fast turnaround on orders













### Dependable Component Quality



Every component in our warehouse meets the durability standards required for residential and commercial garage door systems. Sourced for performance, tested for reliability — the kind of quality that keeps callbacks off your schedule.


- Vetted, grade-rated components

- Residential & commercial spec

- Consistent stock quality
















Warehouse-Scale Stock
Deep inventory on hand — ready to ship or pick up










Reliable Availability
Consistent stock levels you can plan your schedule around










Specialist Knowledge
Industry-familiar team that speaks the language of the trade










Trade & Retail Ready
Serving contractors, installers, and direct customers

Why Professionals Choose MGM



## The Supplier Contractors Actually Rely On


When every job depends on having the right part in hand, MGM Garage Supply delivers. Our warehouse-based inventory, deep hardware specialization, and contractor-first approach make us the trusted industrial hardware supply partner for professionals across the region.













Warehouse-Based

### Direct Inventory Access


We operate from a fully stocked warehouse — not a showroom. Every component is on-hand, ready to pull, and available without the delays of third-party logistics or back-order guesswork.













100% Specialized

### Garage Door Hardware Only


We don't sell everything — we sell one thing extremely well. Our entire catalog is focused on garage door components, so you get depth of selection and genuine product expertise, not a diluted general hardware aisle.













Contractor-First

### Built for the Trade


Our pricing, stock levels, and service model are engineered around the needs of installers and contractors — bulk availability, consistent supply, and a no-nonsense process that respects your time on the job.













Practical Knowledge

### Real Product Expertise


We know the hardware we stock — springs, cables, tracks, rollers, brackets, and more. When you need guidance on compatibility or spec, you get answers from people who understand garage door systems from the ground up.












“
Every garage door job deserves a dependable supply partner — that's exactly what MGM is built to be.

## Products — MGM Garage Supply

Description: Products | MGM Garage Supply. industrial hardware supply

Products — MGM Garage Supply

# Garage Door HardwareCategories & Components


MGM Garage Supply is your trusted industrial hardware supply source for professional-grade garage door components. Whether you're managing a repair, a full replacement, or a new installation, our warehouse carries the dependable parts contractors and installers rely on — built for performance, stocked for availability.







From heavy-duty torsion springs to precision-engineered tracks and mounting hardware, every component in our catalog meets the demands of daily commercial and residential use. Browse our six core product families below to find exactly what your project requires.
















### Springs


Torsion and extension springs engineered for precise counterbalance across residential and commercial door weights. Available in standard and high-cycle ratings.














### Rollers


Steel and nylon rollers in 10-ball, 13-ball, and heavy-duty variants. Designed for smooth, quiet operation and long service life under frequent cycling.














### Hinges


Numbered section hinges (#1 through #5) in galvanized and stainless steel. Properly matched hinges ensure panel alignment and prevent premature wear.














### Tracks


Vertical and horizontal track sections in standard and low-headroom configurations. Precision-formed steel channels that guide roller movement through every cycle.














### Cables


Galvanized lift cables and safety cables rated for residential and commercial loads. Properly tensioned cables are critical to balanced, safe door operation.














### Mounting Hardware


Lag screws, anchor bolts, strut brackets, and jamb hardware for secure structural attachment. Every fastener spec'd for the load demands of heavy door assemblies.





















Industrial Hardware Supply



## Supply Support That Goes Beyond Simple Inventory


At MGM Garage Supply, we don't just stock parts — we help contractors and installers source exactly the right hardware components for every job. Whether you're tracking down a specific bracket, spring, or cable assembly, our warehouse team brings hands-on knowledge to every order so you leave with what you need the first time.









### Common Replacement Parts


Springs, cables, rollers, hinges, and torsion hardware — we keep the most-requested replacement components fully stocked so your jobs never stall waiting on back-orders.











### Matching Compatible Components


Not sure if a part is compatible with your existing system? Our team helps match hardware by gauge, load rating, and manufacturer spec — eliminating costly trial-and-error on the job site.











### Warehouse-Ready Availability


Walk in or call ahead — our warehouse carries deep inventory so you can pick up same-day. No long lead times, no minimum orders. Just straightforward access to the parts professionals depend on.






Talk to Our Supply Team

























Warehouse Ready














Hardware Details



## Built to Perform.Engineered to Last.


Every component in our industrial hardware supply catalog is selected for durability, precision fit, and long-term reliability. From torsion springs to cable drums, each part is warehouse-stocked and ready for professional installation.

## Why Choose the Right Supplier


Not every hardware supplier is built for the demands of garage door work. MGM Garage Supply is a dedicated industrial hardware supply warehouse — stocked deep, focused entirely on garage door components, and ready to serve both trade professionals and residential customers who need parts that perform.














### Consistent Product Focus


We do one thing and we do it well — garage door hardware. Every spring, cable, hinge, bracket, and roller in our warehouse is sourced specifically for garage door systems. No guesswork, no generic substitutes. When you need the right part, we have it.












### Warehouse-Scale Stock


Our warehouse holds deep inventory across the full range of garage door hardware — from standard residential components to heavy-duty commercial-grade parts. Contractors and installers can count on consistent availability without the delays of back-orders or limited supply runs.












### Practical, Direct Service


No layers of complexity — just straightforward supply. Whether you're a contractor pulling regular orders or a homeowner sourcing a specific replacement part, our team understands garage door hardware and can point you to exactly what you need, fast.












### Reliable Sourcing for Trade & Home


From professional installers managing multiple job sites to homeowners tackling a single repair, MGM Garage Supply bridges the gap between trade-grade sourcing and accessible retail. Dependable supply you can build your schedule around — every time.









Talk to Our Team

## The Warehouse Team That Pros Rely On — MGM Garage Supply

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: Since day one, MGM Garage Supply has been the backbone of contractors and installers across Brooklyn and beyond. Discover our story, our warehouse-first approach, and why we outperform every brooklyn hardware supply co in the region.

The Warehouse Team That Pros Rely On — MGM Garage Supply

Our Story



## Built From the Ground Up,Stocked for the Job


MGM Garage Supply started with a straightforward idea: contractors and homeowners deserve a reliable source for garage door hardware — one that actually keeps inventory, knows the product, and delivers without the runaround. From our warehouse, we stock a comprehensive range of industrial hardware supply components including springs, cables, rollers, hinges, tracks, and openers, all organized and ready to ship.


Over the years we've built strong relationships with professional installers, construction contractors, and property managers across the region — earning a reputation as the supplier that shows up when it matters. Whether you're replacing a single part or outfitting a full commercial installation, our warehouse is stocked to meet your timeline.




Our mission is simple: dependable supply, practical expertise, and a commitment to serving every professional and homeowner who walks through our door.





5,000+
SKUs In Stock



24hrs
Order Turnaround



Pro & DIY
Customers Served














Warehouse Direct















Our Foundation

## What Defines MGM Garage Supply


Built from the warehouse floor up — three principles guide every order, every part, and every relationship we build in the industrial hardware supply industry.











01

Specialization



### Deep-Focus Expertise in Garage Door Hardware



We don't carry everything — we carry the right things. MGM Garage Supply concentrates exclusively on garage door components: springs, cables, rollers, hinges, tracks, and openers. This singular focus means our inventory depth and product knowledge surpass any general-purpose distributor. When contractors and installers come to us, they get a partner who understands the mechanics, the tolerances, and the demands of every job site.













02

Reliability



### Consistent Stock, Dependable Delivery, Zero Surprises



A job stalled is a job that costs money. Our warehouse-based model keeps critical hardware in-stock and ready to ship — not back-ordered, not delayed. We maintain robust inventory levels across all major product categories so that when a contractor needs a replacement torsion spring or a full track assembly on short notice, we can deliver. Reliability isn't a promise we make; it's the operational standard we hold ourselves to every single day.













03

Practical Support



### Real Guidance From People Who Know the Parts



Technical questions deserve technical answers. Our team doesn't just process orders — we help customers identify the correct gauge, the right spring wind, and the compatible hardware for their specific application. Whether you're a seasoned installer sourcing bulk components or a facility manager handling a one-off repair, we provide the kind of straightforward, knowledgeable support that saves time and prevents costly mistakes. That practical, workshop-grade assistance is what keeps our customers coming back.





















How We Work



## Getting You the Right Hardware,Every Time


At MGM Garage Supply, we've built a straightforward process that connects contractors, installers, and customers with exactly the industrial hardware supply they need — no guesswork, no delays. Here's how we work with you from first contact to confident order.









01






### Understand the Component


We start by listening. Tell us what you're working on — a spring replacement, a track assembly, a cable system — and we identify the exact component you need from our warehouse inventory.













02






### Confirm the Right Hardware Type


Garage door hardware isn't one-size-fits-all. We verify specifications — door weight, track gauge, spring tension ratings — to confirm the correct part number and grade before anything ships.













03






### Prepare Reliable Supply Access


Our warehouse is stocked with professional-grade garage door parts ready for fast fulfillment. We prepare your order with care, ensuring quantity accuracy and proper packaging for every component.













04






### Move Forward with Confidence


You leave with the right part, the right information, and a reliable supplier you can return to. Whether you're a seasoned installer or a first-time buyer, we make the process simple and dependable.































## Trusted by the Trades.Proven in the Field.


From veteran installers to first-time homeowners, MGM Garage Supply has built a reputation as the go-to source for dependable industrial hardware supply — right when you need it.








“


MGM has never let us down on a deadline. When we're mid-install and need a specific spring or cable component, they have it on the shelf — no waiting, no excuses. That kind of reliability is everything in this trade.





Carlos R.
Garage Door Installer — 12 Years






“


The product knowledge at MGM is unmatched. I've worked with a lot of hardware supply outfits, and these guys actually understand what contractors need. They helped me spec the right hardware for a tricky custom install — saved me hours.





David M.
Independent Contractor






“


I came in as a homeowner with no idea what I needed. The team walked me through every part, explained what was compatible with my door, and I left with exactly the right hardware. Couldn't ask for better service.





Sandra T.
Homeowner, Brooklyn

## Your Warehouse Source for Garage Door Hardware


MGM Garage Supply operates as a dedicated warehouse resource for contractors, installers, and trade professionals seeking quality garage door hardware. Our industrial supply hub is stocked with a comprehensive range of components, parts, and hardware built for real-world installations.







Supply Inquiries









Email Our Team









Warehouse Location




















Industrial Hardware Supply















Got Questions?

## Common Questions About MGM Garage Supply


Everything you need to know about our industrial hardware supply, who we serve, and how to get in touch with our team.









### What hardware categories does MGM Garage Supply carry?


We stock a comprehensive range of garage door hardware including springs, cables, rollers, hinges, tracks, brackets, openers, and weatherstripping. Our warehouse holds both residential and commercial-grade components to cover virtually every installation or repair need.






### Who does MGM Garage Supply primarily serve?


We primarily serve professional contractors, garage door installers, and trade businesses who need reliable access to quality industrial hardware supply. Our warehouse setup is built for volume orders and repeat trade accounts that demand fast turnaround.






### Can homeowners purchase directly from MGM?


Absolutely. While our core focus is serving trade professionals, homeowners are welcome to inquire about specific parts or components. We recommend reaching out to our team first so we can confirm availability and guide you to the right product for your garage door system.






### Do you offer bulk or wholesale pricing?


Yes. We offer competitive wholesale pricing for contractors and businesses placing regular or high-volume orders. Contact our team to discuss account setup and pricing tiers tailored to your project scale and frequency of purchase.






### How can I reach the MGM Garage Supply team?


You can get in touch by phone, email, or by visiting our warehouse directly. Use the contact form on this page or call us during business hours and our team will respond promptly. We're here to help you source the right parts quickly and efficiently.






### Do you carry parts for both residential and commercial garage doors?


Yes. Our inventory spans both residential and commercial garage door hardware. Whether you're working on a standard home garage or a heavy-duty commercial roll-up door, we stock the components you need from trusted manufacturers in the industry.









Still have a question? Our team is ready to help.

Contact Our Team



















YOUR GARAGE DOOR HARDWARE SPECIALIST

MGM Garage Supply keeps the warehouse stocked so you never have to wait. Whether you're a contractor sourcing parts or a homeowner tracking down a specific component, our industrial hardware supply team is ready to help — fast, direct, and knowledgeable.

## Privacy Policy

Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/15/2026



MGM Garage Supply ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: MGM Garage Supply

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 15, 2026



MGM Garage Supply is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: MGM Garage Supply

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 15, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - MGM Garage Supply

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Hardware Supply provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


MGM Garage Supply provides Hardware Supply through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by MGM Garage Supply. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: MGM Garage Supply

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
